description_long: This wallet features a rectangular, elongated shape with rounded corners and a zippered closure running along three of its edges. The front panel displays a gradient color transition from a muted red at the top to a beige tone at the bottom, with a subtle woven texture visible across the surface. The back panel is a lighter beige with the same woven pattern, showing some faint discoloration and marks. The sides and zipper trim are black, providing a strong contrast to the main body. The zipper pull is small and black, positioned on the right edge. The wallet appears to be made primarily of a textile or synthetic fabric with reinforced edges, and is designed to be hand-held and portable.
description: A rectangular wallet with a red-to-beige woven front, beige back, and black zipper trim. It features a zippered closure and subtle surface wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows a red-to-beige gradient woven panel with black trim and a small zipper pull on the right.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the wallet's slim profile and the black zipper running along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view displays a beige woven panel with faint discoloration and the black zipper trim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the slim profile and zipper, mirroring the other side.
attribute_visible_wear_or_damage: faint discoloration and minor marks on both front and back panels
attribute_decorative_pattern: subtle woven texture pattern across all panels
